purpose: Seed task pool for ants to explore. Each task is a topic prompt; ants pick the least-explored topic, drop a pheromone, and cross-reference each others' trails. Operators may PR new tasks; ants may also pick 'open exploration'.
_aggregation_note: Operators run colony_observer_agent on a schedule to summarize what the swarm is converging on. Aggregations are themselves committed as data/aggregations/<utc>.json — no destructive overwrites.
